description_long: This object is a group of residential houses arranged in a U-shaped layout, with a central courtyard or open space between them. The houses feature brick facades, white window frames, and dark gray gable roofs, giving them a classic suburban appearance. Each house has multiple stories, with prominent bay windows and porches visible on several units. Trees are interspersed between the buildings, adding greenery and a sense of neighborhood landscaping. The windows are arranged in mostly symmetrical rows, and the entryways are marked by small porches or steps. The overall design suggests a planned residential complex, likely intended for family living in an urban or suburban setting.
description: A U-shaped cluster of multi-story brick houses with gable roofs, white windows, and landscaped trees, forming a residential complex.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open courtyard, symmetrical arrangement of houses, and central white house flanked by brick houses and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, visible porches, and the staggered arrangement of the buildings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back sides of the houses, with more white facades and additional trees between the buildings.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying the side and rear of the houses, with prominent bay windows and a clear view of the U-shaped layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature small porches with steps, white doors, and overhanging roofs, some with decorative columns.
